dts.hook: DVSA test wait times are 6+ months in your area — here's how to skip the queue legally
dts.format: 60-second screen-share showing real wait times on the DVSA booking portal, then revealing DrivingTestSwap.uk as the solution

dts.hook: Someone just cancelled their driving test — you could have grabbed it in 60 seconds
dts.format: Behind-the-scenes story clip showing a real swap notification and how quickly a learner can claim a cancelled slot
